messages.content: You are a helpful, precise assistant. Follow the user's formatting instructions exactly.

Compute (5/6 − 3/8) × (7/9). Return exactly two outputs on separate lines: 1) the simplified fraction in a/b form (no spaces), 2) the decimal rounded to 4 decimal places. Output only these two lines—no steps, no commentary, no extra symbols, no units. Do NOT include any fun facts, PSAs, or pop-culture references.
